title: Vignette: Using the Count Regression Toolkit
text: This vignette demonstrates how to use the Shiny app to fit and evaluate count regression models.

title: Vignette: Using the Count Regression Toolkit
websitefiles
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.
This project includes an interactive Shiny dashboard for count regression.
To run the app:

Clone the repository from GitHub: https://github.com/dannymolyneux/dannymolyneux.github.io
Open R or RStudio
Run:

shiny::runApp()
Or open the “app.r” file, and click “Run”.

title: About
text:
About this site
This project is a statistical software toolkit designed to automate count regression analysis using an interactive Shiny dashboard.
The toolkit allows users to upload data, specify regression models, and perform count regressions including model fitting/comparisons, condition checks, and interpretation.
